hyperedges.label: Wizard State Flow
hyperedges.summary: Zustand store mediates state handoff across all 4 wizard steps: step, documents, manualData, rawText, extractedData

hyperedges.label: AI Extraction Pipeline
hyperedges.summary: Full AI extraction pipeline: fingerprint validation -> keyword pre-extraction -> LLM -> Zod schema parsing

hyperedges.label: PDF Generation Pipeline
hyperedges.summary: PDF generation: assemble Format053Data/Format069Data -> fill pdfme templates -> merge with pdf-lib

hyperedges.label: Colombian Social Security Validation
hyperedges.summary: Enforces Colombian Decreto 780/2016 rules: IBC calculation, SMMLV minimums, FSP thresholds, business-day deadlines

hyperedges.label: Dual Contract Support
hyperedges.summary: Dual UNAL contract feature: types define optional contract2 fields, aportes sums overlapping IBC, 069 renders two table rows

hyperedges.label: Upload Security Chain
hyperedges.summary: Layered PDF security: client-side magic byte + /JS scan -> server-side keyword fingerprint validation -> AI extraction

nodes.label: PDF Text Extraction API Route
nodes.summary: Extracts raw text from uploaded PDF files for downstream AI processing

nodes.label: AI Extraction API Route
nodes.summary: POST handler: validates PDFs, runs parallel AI extraction, streams NDJSON ExtractionStreamEvent

nodes.label: Contributions Calculator
nodes.summary: calcularContribuciones, calcularIBC, calcularAporteSalud/Pension/ARL, calcularFSP, combineContributions, validarPago

nodes.label: Validation Constants
nodes.summary: SMMLV_2026=1751200, IBC=40%, Salud=12.5%, Pension=16%, FSP thresholds at 4x/16x SMMLV, GAVELA_DIAS_ARL=2

nodes.label: Activity Report Validator
nodes.summary: validarInformeActividades: checks period%, signature freshness (<3 biz days), obligations similarity (30% threshold)

nodes.label: Validation Orchestrator
nodes.summary: runValidations(extracted, manual, informeAdjunto): identity, ARL coverage, payment deadline, contributions, cedular

nodes.label: Sample Contract: OSE No. 14, Daniel Vick Gutierrez
nodes.author: Universidad Nacional de Colombia
nodes.norm_label: sample contract: ose no. 14, daniel vick gutierrez

nodes.label: Security Gap: No Magic Number Verification
nodes.norm_label: security gap: no magic number verification

nodes.label: Root Layout
nodes.summary: Root HTML layout with AncizarSans font, Vercel Analytics, Toaster, Logo footer

nodes.label: Landing Page
nodes.summary: Landing page describing the 4-step wizard workflow

nodes.label: PDF Generation API Route
nodes.summary: Generates and combines final PDF documents (053, 069, planilla, ARL, informe)

nodes.label: Document Dropzone
nodes.summary: Drag-and-drop file upload with PDF magic byte check and /JS pattern scan

nodes.label: Manual Form
nodes.summary: Manual entry form for payment/contractor/supervisor data with deduction file uploads

nodes.label: Extraction Editors
nodes.summary: Editable UI for AI-extracted data: PlanillaEditor, ARLEditor, ContractEditor, ActivityReportEditor, ConfidenceDot

nodes.label: Wizard Step 1 - Document Upload
nodes.summary: Orchestrates document upload, ManualForm; manages contractCount and involvedContracts state

nodes.label: Wizard Step 2 - AI Extraction
nodes.summary: Fetches raw text, calls /api/extract with NDJSON streaming, shows extraction editors, computes payment deadline

nodes.label: Wizard Step 3 - Validation
nodes.summary: Runs runValidations, shows ValidationResults and ContributionGrid, handles optional file uploads

nodes.label: Wizard Step 4 - PDF Download
nodes.summary: Triggers PDF generation via /api/generate and provides download link

nodes.label: Wizard Zustand Store
nodes.summary: Global wizard state: step, documents, manualData, rawText, extractedData. Persists manualData only.

nodes.label: Core TypeScript Types
nodes.summary: All domain types: WizardStep, ContractType, ManualFormData, ExtractedData, ValidationResult, Format053Data, Format069Data

nodes.label: Institution Constants
nodes.summary: SEDE=SEDE MANIZALES, CIUDAD=Manizales

nodes.label: Contract Labels Constants
nodes.summary: CONTRACT_LABELS maps ContractType enum values to human-readable Spanish labels

nodes.label: PDF Format Data Builder
nodes.summary: buildFormat053Data() and buildFormat069Data(): assembles typed input objects for pdfme template filling

nodes.label: Document Fingerprint Validator
nodes.summary: isDocumentMatch(text, docType) using FINGERPRINTS: require[][] keyword groups for pila/arl/contract/report

nodes.label: PDF Form Filler
nodes.summary: fill053(), fill069(), combinePDFs(), generateValidationCertificate(). Uses pdfme generate + pdf-lib merge.

nodes.label: Keyword Extractor
nodes.summary: extractARLCandidates, extractPILACandidates, extractContractCandidates, detectIssuer, joinSplitDates, SOI_ROW_RE

nodes.label: Activity Report Zod Schema
nodes.summary: ActivityReportSchema: items[], signatureDate, periodFrom/To, opsStart/End, isSigned, name/doc match

nodes.label: ARL Zod Schema
nodes.summary: ARLSchema with toISO date transform normalizing DD/MM/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD

nodes.label: Contract Zod Schema
nodes.summary: ContractSchema with toDMY transform, 30+ ContractType values, nested activityReport and specificObligations

nodes.label: Payment Sheet Zod Schema
nodes.summary: PaymentSheetSchema: sheetNumber, paymentDate DD/MM/YYYY, paymentDeadline nullable, period MM/YYYY, totals

nodes.label: Date Parser Utilities
nodes.summary: parseRobustDate (DD/MM/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, native Date), formatToISO, formatToDisplay using date-fns

nodes.label: Payment Deadline Calculator
nodes.summary: calcularFechaLimite(period, documentNumber), esDiaHabil, getHolidaysForYear, TABLA_DIGITOS for business day assignment

nodes.label: 4-Step Wizard Flow
nodes.summary: Upload -> AI Extraction -> Validation -> PDF Download wizard pattern

nodes.label: NDJSON Streaming Pattern
nodes.summary: Newline-delimited JSON streaming for real-time AI extraction progress events

nodes.label: Colombian Social Security Rules
nodes.summary: IBC=40% of monthly value, SMMLV minimum base, FSP at 4x/16x SMMLV, Decreto 780/2016 deadlines

nodes.label: Dual Contract Support
nodes.summary: Two simultaneous UNAL contracts: IBC overlap summation when date ranges overlap, separate table rows in 069

nodes.label: Keyword Fingerprinting
nodes.summary: Before AI extraction, validate PDF doc type by presence of characteristic keyword groups

nodes.label: Client-side PDF Security Checks
nodes.summary: Magic byte check (%PDF header) and /JS, /JavaScript pattern scan before upload

nodes.label: Cedular Declaration
nodes.summary: calcularDeclaracionCedular: formal declaration block for Format 069 based on contractor category

nodes.label: pdfme Template System
nodes.summary: JSON templates in lib/templates/ filled by pdfme generate() with text/multiVariableText/image plugins

nodes.label: Confidence Level System
nodes.summary: ConfidenceLevel enum (high/medium/low/none) shown as colored dots in extraction editors for each AI-extracted field
